M267.basis: FACT-CHECK CORRECTION 2026-05-11: Original V6 assignment 'min/mīn' (HIGH) was wrong. M267 has freq=400 in the Holdat corpus and appears across ALL motif types (unicorn 127, zebu bull 72, elephant 37, rhinoceros 25, etc.) — it is NOT an iconographic fish sign. The actual Mahadevan fish sign is M047 (freq=13, P47 in Parpola's system, as documented in mahadevan_parpola_crosswalk.json). M267 is most likely a high-frequency functional/suffixal sign. Downgraded from HIGH. Previous: {'reading': 'min/mīn', 'confidence': 'HIGH', 'basis': 'Fish sign = star/planet (Parpola)'}
M267.source: Phase-74 grammar z=8.04 p<0.0001 + Phase-64 score=7.0

M063.basis: FACT-CHECK CORRECTION 2026-05-11: Original V7 assignment was HIGH based on claimed 'lift > 5.0 on gharial seals'. Actual measured gharial lift = 4.35 (below threshold). M063 appears on 3/18 seals with gharial motif (vs. 4 unicorn, 3 zebu bull). Reading 'mutalai' (Tamil: crocodile/gharial, DEDR 4954) is plausible given gharial association, but not exclusive enough for HIGH confidence. Downgraded HIGH → MEDIUM. Previous: {'reading': 'mutalai', 'confidence': 'HIGH', 'basis': 'Exclusive to gharial seals (lift > 5.0); PDR mutalai = crocodile'}

_citation.derivation: HIGH/MEDIUM confidence anchors from V7 iconographic analysis (Parpola 2010, C.2) and V8-V24 distributional analysis (Holdat corpus A.10 + Mahadevan M-numbers A.1). Fact-checked 2026-05-11: M267 downgraded to UNCERTAIN; M063 to MEDIUM; M047 upgraded.
authors_credited: Miller, William Sr / Holdat LLC (2025) — corpus for distributional analysis
Burrow, T. & Emeneau, M.B. (1984) — DEDR: Tamil word readings (DEDR refs in basis fields)
_citation.see_also: CITATIONS.md sections A.1, A.10, C.1, C.2, E.1
_citation.caveat: HIGH: 7 anchors — iconographic or terminal case-marker evidence. MEDIUM: 65 anchors — distributional + collocation evidence. LOW: 260 anchors — positional heuristic only, NOT verified phonetic readings. UNCERTAIN: 1 (M267 — high-frequency functional sign, identity unknown). For publication: report only HIGH + MEDIUM anchors as scientifically supportable.

_cleanup_note: 2026-05-17: Removed 196 nīr/INIT/TERM/MED placeholder entries from V8-V24 autonomous loops. Retained 137 real anchors.
